description: Implement a skills registry where each skill is a named prompt fragment with a description. Skills are defined in agent-runtime-config or .ao/config.json. When an agent profile references skills by ID, the skill prompt fragments are injected into the agent's system prompt at spawn time. Built-in skills: 'prioritization', 'requirement-refinement', 'code-review', 'testing-strategy', 'estimation'. Project-level skills in .ao/config.json can add domain-specific behaviors.
title: Add skills/prompt fragment system for reusable agent behaviors
